text: Stepping into this vivid, immersive space, I feel the tension between sterility and inspiration. The sterile corridor just outside contrasts starkly with the vibrant, thought-provoking installation before me. Here, creativity and systematic research collide, inviting contemplation about innovation and our place within constructed environments. The artificiality feels intentional, almost like a stage—am I observer or participant? I sense anticipation and curiosity, caught between the clinical order of the office and the imaginative chaos of the display. It's both unsettling and exciting, as if I've entered a threshold where new ideas might emerge.
